items.title: FDA-approved drug may finally help immunotherapy defeat rare liver cancer
items.summary: Researchers found that a rare liver cancer evades immunotherapy by luring immune T cells away from the tumor and trapping them in nearby fibrous tissue. items.title: They knew the pill was fake but their memory still improved
items.summary: Healthy older adults experienced measurable improvements in memory, physical performance, and stress after taking placebo pills for just three weeks. The most surprising finding was that the placebo often worked even when participants knew the pills were completely inactive.

items.title: Osteopenia is silently weakening bones in millions of people
items.summary: Osteopenia is a common but often overlooked condition that causes bones to become less dense and more fragile.
